summary: CRA-to-Vite-8 Migration Testing Complete - Backend 100% (17/17 tests passed), Frontend 100% (all pages load correctly). Migration successful with no regressions.

warnings.description: JSX parsing warning during Vite scan phase - does not affect functionality
warnings.details: Vite 8 with rolldown/oxc shows 'Unexpected JSX expression' warning during dependency scan, but the dev server runs correctly

critical_code_review_comments: Vite 8 migration successful - app runs on Vite v8.0.7
Custom transformJsxInJs plugin correctly handles JSX in .js files (CRA migration compat)
Environment variables using REACT_APP_ prefix work correctly with Vite's loadEnv + define
Authentication flow works: login, logout, protected routes
All navigation menu items visible after login: Admin, Content, Business, Web3, Security, Tools, Industry, Label, Finance, Social, About, Creator Profile, Messages, Analytics, Plans
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRA-to-Vite-8 migration completed successfully. Frontend now uses Vite 8.0.7 with rolldown/oxc for JSX-in-JS handling. All source files kept .js extension (not renamed to .jsx). The scan phase shows a non-fatal warning about JSX parsing but the dev server runs fine. Test credentials: owner@bigmannentertainment.com / Test1234! and cveadmin@test.com / Test1234!
